mapper.select: SELECT INQUIRY_ID AS inquiryId, USER_ID AS userId, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, STATUS AS status, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, PHONE AS phone, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM LQ_BUSINESS_INQUIRY WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_BUSINESS_INQUIRY ( inquiry_id, user_id, title, content, status, zip_code, address, address_detail, phone, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_BUSINESS_INQUIRY_PK.nextval, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{phone}, sysdate )
